title: Line 31215 – PPIP premiums payable on self-employment income - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 31215 – PPIP premiums payable on self-employment income
To claim an amount on line 31215, you must be required to pay Quebec Parental Insurance Plan (QPIP) premiums on line 439 of your Revenu Québec Income Tax Return .

## Completing your return
If you were a resident of Quebec on December 31 , 2025, claim (in dollars and cents) the amount from line 10 of Schedule 10, Employment Insurance (EI) and Provincial Parental Insurance Plan (PPIP) Premiums .
The maximum amount you can claim on line 31215 of your return is $484.12.

## Forms and publications
- Schedule 10, Employment Insurance (EI) and Provincial Parental Insurance Plan (PPIP) Premiums
- Quebec Parental Insurance Plan

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
